Senior Frontend Engineer

Northwind Labs is building the analytics platform that data teams actually enjoy using. We are looking for a senior frontend engineer to own major features across our React and TypeScript application, drive performance and accessibility, and mentor other engineers on the team.

You will ship production React and TypeScript daily, own the design-system components used across the product, and work closely with design and backend to deliver features end to end. Strong grasp of modern build tooling, state management, testing, and web performance expected.

Bonus points for experience with data-visualisation, GraphQL, and design systems at scale.
